Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
Renal function is mildly impaired (slightly elevated serum creatinine). Urinalysis shows proteinuria, ketonuria, glucosuria, and bilirubinuria, with low specific gravity and abnormal urine appearance, suggesting possible renal tubular dysfunction or urinary tract pathology. Blood glucose is normal, but HbA1c is low, possibly due to anemia or recent changes in glycemic control. No evidence of infection (negative nitrites/leukocytes). Recommend further evaluation of renal function and possible underlying causes for abnormal urine findings.
